'''tazama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poblano|poblano]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poblano|poblano]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tazama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæzæmæth|tæzæmæth]] || [[word:tæzæmæj|tæzæmæj]] || [[word:tæzæmæsh|tæzæmæsh]] || [[word:tæzæmæ|tæzæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazazamath|tazazamath]] || [[word:tazazamaj|tazazamaj]] || [[word:tazazamash|tazazamash]] || [[word:tazazama|tazazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazamath|tazamath]] || [[word:tazamaj|tazamaj]] || [[word:tazamash|tazamash]] || [[word:tazama|tazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazafmath|tazafmath]] || [[word:tazafmaj|tazafmaj]] || [[word:tazafmash|tazafmash]] || [[word:tazafmaf|tazafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazamatha|tazamatha]] || [[word:tazamaja|tazamaja]] || [[word:tazamasha|tazamasha]] || [[word:tazamaka|tazamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazamath|tazamath]] || [[word:tazamaj|tazamaj]] || [[word:tazamash|tazamash]] || [[word:tazama|tazama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazamathal|tazamathal]] || [[word:tazamajal|tazamajal]] || [[word:tazamashal|tazamashal]] || [[word:tazamakal|tazamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazamathatha|tazamathatha]] || [[word:tazamajaja|tazamajaja]] || [[word:tazamashasha|tazamashasha]] || [[word:tazamaka|tazamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazamathan|tazamathan]] || [[word:tazamajan|tazamajan]] || [[word:tazamashan|tazamashan]] || [[word:tazamakan|tazamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazamathaoro|tazamathaoro]] || [[word:tazamajaoro|tazamajaoro]] || [[word:tazamashaoro|tazamashaoro]] || [[word:tazamakaoro|tazamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
